# services.mame

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mame`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mame.emuAddr` | `string` | IP address of the guest system. The same you set inside guest OS under MAME. Should be on the same subnet as {option}`services.mame.hostAddr`. |
| `services.mame.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to setup TUN/TAP Ethernet interface for MAME emulator. |
| `services.mame.hostAddr` | `string` | IP address of the host system. Usually an address of the main network adapter or the adapter through which you get an internet connection. |
| `services.mame.user` | `string` | User from which you run MAME binary. |
